arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ message over Abdoulaye Kamara and other fringe players exiting in window
arts.sum: John Mousinho insisted he’s not yet ready to consider exits for his Pompey fringe players in this window.

arts.ttl: West Brom v Portsmouth: 2 changes in predicted line-up and role for new 'teen sensation' at Hawthorns
arts.sum: There’s much for John Mousinho to ponder as Pompey aim for their third league win on the bounce at West Brom this weekend.

arts.ttl: Ian Pearce and Tony Mowbray working 'till late' as West Brom pursue striker transfer
arts.sum: He might only be through the doors of West Bromwich Albion, and is still having to get to know his new players on first-name terms, but Tony Mowbray is already working with the club's hierarchy to help identify a centre forward who fits the bill for the club before the transfer window deadline passes. There are one or two issues as to why you can or can't get certain players in, how eligible they are, but generally the club are working hard and trying to help.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone does have a value' - Notts County boss' response after top-scorer Alassana Jatta linked with Portsmouth, Plymouth and Bolton
arts.sum: Stuart Maynard has admitted every player has his price, after Pompey were this week linked with a move for his top-scorer at Notts County - Alassana Jatta.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray reveals 'wow' moment as Isaac Price makes impression in West Brom training
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray has taken an instant liking to what he's seen from West Bromwich Albion new signing Isaac Price in training - but the boss has indicated that the proof will be in the pudding when it comes to the young midfielder producing the same on The Hawthorns ' turf. "From what I've watched and trained with him yesterday he looks a very talented young boy," Mowbray said.

arts.ttl: West Brom's injury plan for Daryl Dike as Tony Mowbray updates on Kyle Bartley
arts.sum: Returning boss Tony Mowbray, who witnessed the striker score the winner against his Sunderland side in December 2022, has seen Dike work in training this week since he rejoined the club and knows that handling the player's workload is of the utmost importance. There is a plan for what he needs to do at the moment, which is a bit frustrating for him because he is thinking he wants to get out there and train like everybody else.

arts.ttl: 22-year-old could undergo Stoke City medical today after West Brom transfer collapse
arts.sum: Stoke City are looking to wrap up the signing of Ipswich Town’s Ali Al-Hamadi with a medical possibly… The post 22-year-old could undergo Stoke City medical today after West Brom transfer collapse appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: How Newcastle United arrival could offer transfer clue to next Portsmouth window moves
arts.sum: John Mousinho insists there are other Championship-ready loans Pompey can recruit in the winter window.

arts.ttl: West Brom midfielder attracting loan interest from other clubs
arts.sum: West Brom midfielder Harry Whitwell is attracting loan interest from elsewhere at the moment, as detailed in a… The post West Brom midfielder attracting loan interest from other clubs appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss issues surprise defender transfer stance despite clear Championship squad concern
arts.sum: John Mousinho has admitted Pompey are not focussing transfer attentions on a new left-back in the winter window.
